channel.title: Allen Institute (AI2)
channel.description: Allen Institute (AI2) — synthesized feed by ai-news-spider

item.title: DiScoFormer: One transformer for density and score, across distributions
item.description: DiScoFormer is a transformer-based density and score estimator that can infer both quantities from a finite sample in one forward pass, generalizing classical KDE while staying accurate in high-dimensional and out-of-distribution settings without retraining for each new distribution.
